description: Classic four-hole lace-up shoe with clean, slim silhouetting and a refined stacked heel, by clarks for men. Strategic stitch detailing on this narrow derby shoe is a sartorial dream. A minimalist's reinterpretation of the classic Derby, wear this shoe crafted from Italian leather with slim Fit formal shirts and trousers. UpperLeather upper with a tapering toe box with seamsFour-hole central lace-upsPadded leather liningSoft sockliner for instep comfortPadded tongueMidsoleShock absorbing EVA midsoleOutsoleTPR outsole with a stacked heelPatterned grooves on the midfoot for grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
